data.content: Expanded ReTakes metadata rendering robustness in retakes-view: added extra step/note/handoff key aliases, metadata description fallback, broader content key support, and deeper agent-detail extraction (including nested metadata/actor/user/agent shapes). Commit 90674f3 pushed to origin/main. Gates: lint warnings-only baseline, bunx tsc --noEmit pass, tests pass, build still fails on pre-existing Next prerender/useContext issue.
